headline: Amazon Web Services (AWS)
description: AWS is the world's largest cloud provider, launched in 2006 with S3 and EC2. It offers 200+ services across compute, storage, database, ML, IoT, and serverless. AWS holds ~32% cloud market share (2025). Key services: EC2 (VMs), S3 (object storage), Lambda (serverless), DynamoDB (NoSQL), RDS (managed databases).
